title: Business Analyst - Pricing / Sales and Ops (f/m/x)
required_skills: 3+ years experience in data analytics or business analysis
Excellent analytical skills with attention to detail
matched_skills: 3+ years experience in data analytics or business analysis
Excellent analytical skills with attention to detail
core_responsibilities: Collaborate with Pricing and Sales & Ops stakeholders to clarify objectives and decision-making needs
Deliver reports, dashboards, and ad-hoc analyses that provide actionable insights supporting pricing strategy
Challenge assumptions and recommend relevant KPIs by combining data with business context
Manage and prioritize multiple analytical requests balancing speed and accuracy
Ensure data clarity, consistency, and reliability for sound business decisions
recommended_emphasis: Highlight any hands-on SQL experience from past roles, even if informal or project-based
Emphasize dashboard and reporting work (executive dashboards at Minth Group, budget dashboards at HSBC)
Stress stakeholder-facing analytical communication — C-level data storytelling and cross-functional coordination
Frame financial analytics at HSBC as pricing/commercial insight work to align with the pricing domain
Mention data quality QA at Hapag-Lloyd to demonstrate attention to data reliability and consistency
Add any BI tool exposure (Power BI, Tableau, Looker) explicitly to CV skills section
